name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-92
title: Stale spec invariants reference removed/superseded artifacts (Inv 7 rabbit-policy markers, Inv 14 generate-skills-dir.py)
description:
Two stale invariants:
1. Inv 7 (spec.md:37) says CLAUDE.md 'contains inline rabbit-policy-start/rabbit-policy-end section'. generate-claude-md.py now emits only header + @-imports; test-claude-md.py:56-59 explicitly asserts the marker is absent. The corresponding regex/_policy_section helper in sync-check.py:90-96,120 always returns empty (dead code).
2. Inv 14 (spec.md:48) documents generate-skills-dir.py --check behavior (sha256 comparison) but Inv 27 (spec.md:506-511) declares that script does NOT exist (deleted, superseded by build.py). Internal contradiction inside the same spec.
Fix: delete Inv 7 + the corresponding dead code in sync-check.py; either delete Inv 14 entirely or rewrite it to defer to build.py --check.
